Home / Products / 4 Ply Paper

4 Ply Paper

Paper + PE + Foil + PE

Enhancing the versatility of 3 Ply Paper, an extra polymer layer creates 4 Ply Paper, a material highly valued in the pharmaceutical industry for packaging tablet strips and ORS powders. It preserves formulation effectiveness by protecting against moisture and harmful elements while maintaining potency over time.

Talk to our team

Applications

  • Pharmaceutical tablet strips
  • ORS powders (e.g. Electral)
  • Pan masala packaging
  • Moisture sensitive food & medicine

Key Properties

  • Blocks moisture effectively
  • Maintains product freshness
  • Protects against extreme temperatures
  • Preserves formulation potency

Specifications

ConstructionPaper + PE + Foil + PE

Variants & Coatings

Glassine 4 PlyChromo 4 PlyKraft 4 PlyPEAluminium foil
FAQ

4 Ply Paper, questions answered

What is 4 Ply Paper used for?
4 Ply Paper is used for pharmaceutical tablet strips, ors powders (e.g. electral), pan masala packaging, moisture sensitive food & medicine.
Does K P Packaging manufacture or distribute 4 Ply Paper?
K P Packaging manufactures 4 Ply Paper in house at its Silvassa plant using extrusion coating and lamination.
What are the key features of 4 Ply Paper?
Blocks moisture effectively; Maintains product freshness; Protects against extreme temperatures; Preserves formulation potency.
